title: 10 best herbal teas for dark lips
intro_desc: Herbal teas for dark lips are natural remedies that help reduce the darkness of lips, making them appear fuller and more attractive. These teas typically contain ingredients like chamomile, rose petals, hibiscus, and sage, which are rich in antioxidants and vitamins that nourish and moisturize the lips. By drinking these teas or using them as a lip rinse, the lips absorb the nutrients, promoting healthy lip color and texture. For example, chamomile tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe and lighten dark lips, while rose petals contain vitamins A and C that help exfoliate and rejuvenate the lips. By using herbal teas for dark lips, individuals can improve their confidence and self-esteem, feeling more comfortable and happy with their appearance.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: New England aster teas helps with dark lips because it has natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm irritated skin. The herbal tea contains flavonoids, which have been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce the appearance of hyperpigmentation, resulting in a more even-toned lip complexion. Additionally, New England aster teas has antibacterial properties that help to combat infection-causing bacteria and fungi, promoting healthy lips and reducing the likelihood of dark spots or discoloration.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: New England Aster's flavonoids and terpenes have anti-inflammatory effects that can reduce redness and swelling associated with dark lips, promoting a clearer appearance.

Antioxidant properties: The tea's antioxidants, such as quercetin and kaempferol, help neutralize free radicals that contribute to lip discoloration and damage, protecting the skin from oxidative stress.

Astringent and antibacterial properties: New England Aster's tannins can constrict blood vessels and reduce excess moisture, while its antimicrobial compounds combat bacterial overgrowth that may exacerbate dark lips.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which have been shown to help lighten and brighten lip discoloration.
Bark: Containing flavonoids, which can help reduce inflammation and promote skin health, contributing to a reduction in dark lip appearance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried new england aster flowers at dawn or late afternoon when they are fragrant and free of dew.
Cleanly dry the harvested flowers in a single layer on paper bags or cloth towels for 1-2 weeks.
Measure out one tablespoon of dried new england aster flowers per eight ounces of boiling water for every infusion.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes in a ceramic teapot or infuser to allow the herbal properties to meld with the water.
Strain and serve the tea hot, garnished with lemon slices if desired, or let it cool for a refreshing cold brew.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Canada goldenrod teas helps with dark lips because of its natural ability to brighten and even out skin tone. The tea contains flavonoids, which are powerful antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and hyper-pigmentation, common causes of dark lips. By soothing the skin and reducing oxidative stress, Canada goldenrod tea promotes a more radiant and uniform lip color, giving you a healthier-looking smile. Regular consumption of this tea can lead to a noticeable reduction in lip darkness and an overall improvement in lip appearance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Goldenrod tea's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation on the skin, which can alleviate dryness and irritation causing dark lips, promoting healthier lip tissues.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in goldenrod tea soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and swelling around the lips, which can contribute to a more even tone and lighter color.
Astringent properties: Goldenrod's astringent qualities help tighten and constrict the skin, reducing moisture loss and dryness on the lips, allowing for a smoother and more even texture.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, the roots help soothe and lighten darkened lip areas.
Bark: Containing astringent compounds, the bark helps reduce inflammation and bleeding associated with dark lips.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried flowers of solidago canadensis at least 10% of the recommended dosage daily.
Measure 1 teaspoon of dried flowers per 8 ounces of boiling water using a digital scale accurately.
Heat the water in a stainless steel kettle to a rolling boil for 5-7 minutes rapidly.
Add the measured dried flowers to the boiling water and steep for 5-10 minutes gently.
Strain the tea through a fine-mesh sieve into a cup and serve warm after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bee balm teas helps with dark lips because it contains powerful antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and lighten the lip area. The tea's antibacterial properties also help to reduce lip inflammation, which can contribute to darkening of the skin. Additionally, bee balm's natural astringent qualities help to tighten the skin around the mouth, reducing the appearance of dark spots and discoloration. By drinking bee balm tea regularly, you can promote healthier, more evenly toned lips.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Bee balm tea's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals that can cause lip discoloration, promoting healthy and even-toned skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in bee balm tea reduce inflammation and swelling in the lips, which can contribute to darkening of the lips, allowing for a more even tone.

Astringent properties: Bee balm's astringent properties help tighten and firm up the skin around the mouth, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promoting a smoother, brighter complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the bee balm plant contain compounds that help to lighten and even out lip color, reducing the appearance of dark lips.
Bark: The bark of the bee balm plant has astringent properties that can help to constrict blood vessels, which may reduce the appearance of dark or discolored lips.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried bee balm leaves and flowers at dawn or just before sunset for maximum potency.
Combine one tablespoon of dried bee balm with one cup of boiling water and let it steep for five to seven minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup using a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth and discard the solids immediately.
Add honey or lemon to taste, if desired, and enjoy the warm tea within the hour after preparation.
Store any leftover tea in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to three days and reheat as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Danshen teas helps with dark lips because they contain a unique combination of herbs that work together to lighten and even out lip pigmentation. The tea's antiseptic properties help to reduce inflammation and prevent further darkening, while its antioxidant properties combat free radicals that can cause hyperpigmentation. Additionally, the tea's natural astringent qualities help to tighten and firm up the skin around the lips, creating a smoother and more even surface for color to appear on.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Danshen tea's anti-inflammatory property helps to reduce inflammation and irritation on the lips, which can contribute to their darkness and dryness.
Antioxidant property: The antioxidant properties of danshen tea help to neutralize free radicals that can cause damage to the lip skin cells, leading to darkening and premature aging.

Vaso-dilating property: Danshen tea's vaso-dilating property helps to improve blood circulation around the lips, which can increase oxygenation and nourishment of the skin, reducing darkness and promoting a healthier appearance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and flavonoids, which help to lighten and soften darkened skin.
Rhizomes: Contain a high concentration of active compounds that soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing discoloration.
remedy_recipe: Measure out one teaspoon of dried danshen root per eight ounces of boiling water.
Steep the roots in boiling water for 10-15 minutes or until it reaches desired strength.
Strain the tea into a cup using a fine-mesh strainer to remove loose particles.
Add honey or other sweeteners to taste if desired and adjust temperature as needed.
Drink the danshen tea immediately after preparation or store in refrigerator for later use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pomegranate teas helps with dark lips because of its powerful antioxidant properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation that can cause discoloration. The antioxidants in pomegranate tea also promote collagen production and improve blood flow to the skin, resulting in a more even and radiant lip color. Additionally, pomegranate's natural astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds help to soothe and lighten dark spots, leaving lips looking smoother and brighter.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Pomegranate tea's antioxidants help to combat free radicals, which can contribute to lip discoloration and inflammation, reducing the appearance of dark lips.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pomegranate tea soothe and calm irritated lips, reducing redness and swelling that can make them appear darker than normal.

Vitamins and Minerals: Pomegranate tea is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like potassium and calcium, which help to nourish and moisturize the lips, promoting a healthy and even tone.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to lighten and even out lip pigmentation.
Seeds: High in ellagic acid, a natural compound that has been shown to inhibit melanin production and reduce the appearance of dark lips.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh or dried punicia granatum flowers, leaves, and fruit rinds in the correct proportions of 1 part herb to 8 parts water.
Combine the harvested punicia granatum components with boiling water in a large glass jar to steep for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the tea mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a separate container to remove solids and sediment.
Add 1 tablespoon of honey for every 8 ounces of tea to sweeten and improve flavor, adjusting to taste.
Allow the tea to cool and then refrigerate or freeze within 24 hours to preserve freshness and quality.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Perilla teas helps with dark lips because it contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the lip area. The tea's flavonoids help to lighten and brighten the skin tone, reducing the appearance of dark spots and pigmentation. Additionally, perilla tea's astringent properties can help to dry out any excessive oil production on the lips, further contributing to its lightening effects.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Perilla tea's antioxidants help to combat oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to darkened lips by reducing the production of melanin and soothing irritated skin.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in perilla tea reduce redness and swelling on the lips, thereby lightening their color and promoting a healthy, even tone.

Vitamin and mineral content: Perilla tea is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like potassium and calcium, which help to nourish and hydrate the skin on the lips, reducing dryness and darkening.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties, the roots help to reduce melanin production and lighten the lip area.
Rhyzomes: Containing a high concentration of flavonoids, rhyzomes possess excellent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory capabilities, making them effective in soothing and brightening dark lips.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh or dried perilla leaves measure out one teaspoon for every eight ounces of water.
Heat filtered water in a kettle or pot to a temperature of 212 degrees fahrenheit.
Add the perilla leaves to a teapot or infuser and pour the hot water over them steeping for five to seven minutes.
Strain the tea into cups and discard the solids add honey to taste if desired.
Allow the tea to cool slightly before serving and enjoy within the next hour.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guarana teas helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants that help to brighten and even out skin tone. The tea's active compounds, including chlorogenic acid and caffeic acid, work together to reduce melanin production, which can cause darkness and discoloration on the lips. Additionally, guarana's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the lip area, reducing redness and irritation that can contribute to darkening of the lips. Regular consumption of herbal guarana tea can lead to a more even-toned, radiant, and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Guarana's high antioxidant content helps to neutralize free radicals that cause oxidative stress, which can contribute to darkening of lip color.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Guarana's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation in the lips, which can also help alleviate symptoms of darkened lips such as dryness and irritation.
Vasoconstrictive properties: The caffeine content in guarana tea helps constrict blood vessels, which can decrease blood flow to the lips, reducing their appearance of being dark or hyperpigmented.
remedy_parts: Roots: Guarana roots are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in soothing and brightening dark lips.
Rhyzomes: The rhizome of the guarana plant contains flavonoids and saponins that help to reduce inflammation and promote collagen production, resulting in healthier-looking lips.
remedy_recipe: Rinse 2 tablespoons of dried guarana seeds with filtered water to remove impurities.
Boil 4 cups of fresh water in a pot and then reduce heat to simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the rinsed guarana seeds to the simmering water and steep for 15-20 minutes.
Strain the tea mixture through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a large bowl.
Store the herbal tea in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Passion fruit teas helps with dark lips because of its natural antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The flavonoids present in passion fruit have been shown to reduce melanin production, which is responsible for darkening of the lips. Additionally, the tea's astringent properties help to dry out the lip area, reducing moisture that can contribute to darkness. By drinking passion fruit tea regularly, individuals with dark lips may experience an improvement in their lip color and texture, leaving them looking smoother and more even-toned.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Passion fruit tea's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can cause lip discoloration and dryness.
Vitamin C Content: The high vitamin C content in passion fruit tea helps to brighten and whiten the lips by promoting collagen production, improving skin texture, and fighting free radicals.
Anti-inflammatory Compounds: Passion fruit tea contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids that can help reduce redness and inflammation caused by dark lips.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help to reduce inflammation and promote healing of darkened skin.
Bark: Containing tannins and flavonoids, bark has astringent properties that can help constrict blood vessels and lighten discolored areas.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh or dried passion fruit leaves and flowers, measuring about 2 tablespoons per 8 oz cup of water.
Heat filtered water to a boil in a teapot or kettle and let it cool down slightly for 3-5 minutes.
Add the measured passion fruit leaves and flowers to the hot water and steep for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the tea mixture through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a large pitcher, discarding solids after 10-15 seconds.
Store the infused herbal tea in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze it for later use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregano teas helps with dark lips because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce the appearance of pigmentation and promote even skin tone. The antioxidants present in oregano tea also help to soothe and calm the skin around the mouth, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to discoloration. Regular consumption of oregano tea may also help to lighten the lips over time, leaving them looking smoother and more radiant.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Oregano tea's high antioxidant content helps to neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and contribute to lip discoloration.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Oregano tea's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as carvacrol and thymol, reduce inflammation in the lips, which can help lighten dark spots and improve overall lip health.

Antimicrobial Properties: Oregano tea's antimicrobial properties help to combat bacterial and fungal infections that can cause darkening of the lips, promoting a healthier and more even-toned complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, oregano roots help reduce lip pigmentation and promote healthy skin.
Bark: Containing natural astringent properties, oregano bark helps constrict blood vessels and reduce excess melanin production, resulting in lighter lips.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality oregano vulgare leaves at dawn for maximum potency and flavor retention.
Combine one teaspoon of dried oregano leaves with one cup of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass teapot.
Allow the mixture to steep for 5-7 minutes, or until the tea reaches your desired strength and flavor profile.
Strain the tea into a separate container using a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth to remove the herb solids.
Serve the tea hot, sweetened with honey if desired, within 30 minutes of preparation for optimal aroma and nutritional value.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sweet basil teas helps with dark lips because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. When consumed as a tea, the antioxidants present in sweet basil work to reduce inflammation and redness associated with darkened lip areas. Additionally, the herb's ability to stimulate blood flow can help to lighten lip color, leaving you with a smoother, more even-toned pout.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sweet basil tea contains antioxidants like rosmarinic acid and eugenol, which can help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress on the lips, thereby lightening their color.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in sweet basil tea, such as caryophyllene and linalool, may help soothe and calm irritated or inflamed lips, reducing redness and darkening caused by inflammation.
Antibacterial Properties: Sweet basil's antibacterial properties can help combat bacterial infections that can cause dark spots on the lips, promoting healthy skin and a more even lip color.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce hyperpigmentation and even out skin tone.
Bark: Containing flavonoids and saponins, which have been traditionally used to lighten and brighten the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried sweet basil leaves and stems, approximately one tablespoon per cup of water.
Rinse the sweet basil with cold filtered water to remove any dirt or debris.
Combine the rinsed sweet basil with one cup of boiling water in a heat-resistant teapot or infuser.
Steep the mixture for 5-7 minutes allowing the sweet basil to release its natural oils and flavor compounds.
Strain the tea into a cup using a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth, discarding the solids and serving warm.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat dark lips with herbal teas is by using them as a natural lip scrub. Steep the herbal tea in hot water, then let it cool. Mix the cooled tea with brown sugar to create a scrub. Gently rub the scrub on your lips for a few minutes, then rinse off. The antioxidants in the herbal tea and the exfoliating properties of the sugar will help to lighten and smooth your lips. Regular use will result in visibly lighter and softer lips.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to dark lips that are treated with herbal teas are often related to skin and oral health. For instance, dry, chapped, or dark lips can be treated with herbal teas like chamomile or rosehip, which are rich in antioxidants and help to soothe and moisturize the lips. Additionally, herbal teas like sage or peppermint can be used to treat cold sores or inflammation around the lips. These teas have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain. Furthermore, drinking herbal teas like green or black tea can improve overall oral health, as they are rich in polyphenols that can help to prevent plaque buildup and reduce the risk of gum disease. However, it is important to note that while herbal teas can be helpful in treating these ailments, they should not be used as a substitute for medical treatment.
